meta.name: Key Switches
meta.description: Key-operated switches for access control and system reset
meta.heroTitle: Key-Operated Switches for Access Control and Signalling
meta.heroDescription:
Low and high voltage key-operated switches available in multiple switch types and electrical configurations, including single-pole, double-pole and three-position arrangements. Optional protective cover and pre-alarm indication available.

Dual mounting system for flush or surface installation. Supplied with 35 mm back box.

Intended for indoor access control, system reset and controlled switching applications.

Not suitable for outdoor use. Not compatible with Enviro Stopper.

options.3: #3 2 Position Key Switch - Key Trapped in 'on' position
